roof_exposed.text: Only the roof and windshield of a {{color}} sedan are visible above the dune. The glass is intact. Inside, dark shapes. The door seam is still sealed.

choices.label: Break the windshield to get inside.

interior.text: The interior is dry and well-preserved — sealed by the dune for years. Bags on the back seat, a first aid kit under the passenger seat. The glove box is locked.

glove_box.text: Inside the glove box: a revolver with six rounds, a folded map, and a sealed prescription bottle. The map means nothing now, but the rest is useful.

glass_fragments.text: Windshield glass sprays inward. A shard opens a line across your cheek.

needle_stab.text: A used syringe rolls out and stabs into your thumb. You don't know what was in it.
